Docs Home

Installation

Install the crate, then wire it into your project. The snippets below are reproduced verbatim so that indentation and punctuation survive the round-trip through the Markdown converter without being altered or re-escaped.

Rust

fn main() {
    let items = vec![1, 2, 3];
    for i in &items {
        println!("item = {}", i);
    }
}

Python

def greet(name):
    print(f"hello, {name}")

JavaScript

const x = [1, 2, 3];
console.log(x.map((n) => n * 2));

Plain

$ cargo build --release
   Compiling widget v0.1.0

Use the inline form Widget::new() to construct one, and the *star* token above should not be treated as emphasis.

Docs footer boilerplate.
